ValidationRule.description: Please select either Managed/World Fleet Aircraft or MSN or Asset/Engine Type.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, AND(leaseworks__Deal_Type__c!='Payment Deferral Request',leaseworks__Deal_Type__c!='Lease Restructuring'), AND( isBlank(leaseworks__MSN_E__c), isBlank(text(leaseworks__Asset_Type__c)), isBlank(text(leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c)), isBlank(leaseworks__Engine__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select either Managed/World Fleet Aircraft or MSN or Asset/Engine Type or Engine
